title: Potato and PvP
description: A modpack that optimizes even low-end computers
body:
![Potato and PvP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e250f1bf4f51e6c2574b7ce941731ba80033130.png)

> **Potato and PvP** ⚔️ is a lightweight Minecraft modpack specifically designed for PvP gameplay. This optimized collection delivers comprehensive combat support while maintaining system efficiency.

![Supported Kits](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92f84c102efa5dfa21be0bb036791950e2eb913e.png)

> **The modpack features support for multiple PvP kits**:
> - Crystal PvP 💎
> - SMP Kit 🌍  
> - Nethpot Kit 🔥
> - Diapot Kit 💎
> - Sword Kit ⚔️
> - Axe Kit 🪓

![Notes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e505c8e07a5f2f931b2c4933d34dfd51d4883c3.png)

> ⚠️ **Performance Note:** While this modpack is optimized for lower-end systems, it may cause performance issues on modern PCS.

> ⚠️ **Launch Note:** Version above 2.0.0 requires Java 21 or higher.

> **Potato and PvP** delivers competitive gameplay accessibility, making high-level PvP features available to players across different hardware specifications.
